item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers the brake, names this as the fourth instance of the same add-a-field pattern, references the prior cover stamp/tax rate/delivery date fixes, and reframes warranty as part of quote-required-elements governance. Although it permits a temporary emergency field, it rejects making the new field the default baseline and moves upstream to checklist, conditional required rules, validation, and consolidation."}
